title: Water Bucket Extinguish
description: Semi PvP-oriented Fabric mod that enhances water bucket usage with smart placement, cobweb handling, and configurable behavior.
body:
# Water Bucket Extinguish

A lightweight **client-side Fabric PvP utility mod** that enhances water bucket usage for combat, clutch situations, and emergency survival.

Works on vanilla servers. No server installation required.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/0nmwsDrVasU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## Overview

Water Bucket Extinguish adds a configurable **panic key** that improves how water buckets behave in high-pressure situations.

Whether you're on fire during PvP, stuck in cobwebs, or reacting in a clutch moment, this mod helps make water bucket usage faster, cleaner, and more consistent — without automating gameplay.

The mod is fully client-side and does not modify server mechanics.

---

## What It Does

With a single key press, the mod can:

- Automatically switch to a water bucket in your hotbar  
- Place water when conditions are met  
- Pick water back up when appropriate  
- Restore your previously selected item  

This improves reaction speed while keeping full player control.

---

## Use Cases

- PvP fire extinguishing  
- Escaping cobweb traps  
- Fast clutch reactions  
- Survival emergency handling  
- Combat utility enhancement  

Unlike full automation or macro-based “auto MLG” mods, Water Bucket Extinguish enhances consistency without removing skill expression.

---

## Features

- Smart fire extinguish double-click logic  
- Faster fire re-pickup timing  
- Cobweb escape support  
- Intelligent water pickup detection  
- Bucket readiness detection (hotbar / inventory / none)  
- Configurable panic key  
- Clean in-game command system  
- HUD display (toggleable & repositionable)  
- HUD position customization (Top Left / Top Right / Bottom Left / Bottom Right)  
- Usage statistics tracking  
- Nether restriction toggle  
- Optional sound feedback  
- Optional action bar feedback  
- Cloth Config integration  

---

## HUD System

The HUD can display bucket readiness:

 ✔ Bucket Ready (in hotbar)  


  ![Bucket Ready](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a95c89823bb1640213a3a8c1bde4568c1f8a0acf.png)  

 ⚠ Bucket in Inventory  

  ![Bucket in Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8719112b74f42e1cbade2ad3afdf9e956f8cdc98.png)  

 ✖ No Bucket Found  

  ![No Bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/562d7218e8e9608ceca7173ac281de7ea0788a08.png)  


Position is fully configurable.

---

## Commands

### Base:
`/waterbucket`  
Shows mod info and version.

`/waterbucket help`  
Shows full command list.

---

  ![/waterbucket help](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5a41226b42711d4ccefe711457b1b0927cba502.png)

---

### Utility

`/waterbucket bucket`  
Check bucket readiness.

`/waterbucket stats`  
View statistics.

`/waterbucket stats reset`  
Reset statistics.

`/waterbucket reload`  
Reload configuration from file.

---

### Configuration

`/waterbucket config pitch <value>`  
`/waterbucket config pitch reset`

`/waterbucket config sound <true|false>`  
`/waterbucket config actionbar <true|false>`  
`/waterbucket config nether <true|false>`  
`/waterbucket config hud <true|false>`

`/waterbucket config hudpos <top_left|top_right|bottom_left|bottom_right>`  
`/waterbucket config hudpos reset`

---

## Compatibility

- Client-side only  
- Works on vanilla servers  
- Does not require server installation  

---

## Requirements

### Required
- Fabric Loader  
- Fabric API  
- Cloth Config  

### Optional
- Mod Menu  

---
